summary: Q2 priorities were locked down with three key decisions: export feature moved to high priority targeting end-of-May release, timezone bug fix assigned to this sprint, and onboarding flow compliance update targeted for end of March. Dependencies identified include Priya's reporting service designs (due 21 March) unblocking James's export work, and Legal providing updated consent copy to unblock onboarding changes. Mobile designs for export feature will extend one week beyond web designs.
decisions: Export feature is a Q2 priority, targeting release by end of May
Timezone bug fix to be completed this sprint
Onboarding flow updated for data consent compliance before end of March
action_items: Finalise reporting service designs by 21 March
Assign timezone bug fix to Aisha this sprint
Confirm sprint plan once reporting service designs are received
Follow up with Legal today to obtain updated consent copy
Review updated Q2 roadmap doc before next Friday
risks: Engineering team already at capacity this sprint
Onboarding flow fix could slip into next sprint if Legal is slow providing consent copy
Mobile designs for export feature will take an extra week beyond web designs
